user.title: Configure Selora AI
user.description: Choose which LLM backend to use for automation suggestions.

anthropic.title: Anthropic (Claude) Configuration
anthropic.description: Enter your Anthropic API key. Get one at console.anthropic.com.

openai.title: OpenAI Configuration
openai.description: Enter your OpenAI API key. Get one at platform.openai.com.

ollama.title: Ollama (Local) Configuration
ollama.description: Enter your local Ollama server details. Make sure the model is pulled.

select_devices.title: Select Devices to Onboard
select_devices.description:
Selora AI found {count} devices on your network. Assign a room to add a device, or select 'Skip' to skip it.

{device_list}

results.title: Device Setup Results
results.description:
Setup complete: {succeeded} succeeded, {failed} failed, {needs_attention} need manual attention.

{details}

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect. Check your API key, or verify Ollama is running and the model is pulled.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Selora AI cloud service. Please try again later.
abort.unknown: An unexpected error occurred during setup.
abort.llm_not_ready: Selora AI LLM backend is not running. Please configure it first.
abort.no_devices_found: No new devices were discovered on your network. Try again later.

init.title: Background Services Settings
init.description: Configure background services for Selora AI.
